task: SSH into ssh.ikangai.com and use the remote clive instance to check disk usage, then compare it with local disk usage. Write a comparison report.
Use local clive to generate an invoice for client Acme Corp (3 line items), then SSH to ssh.ikangai.com and have remote clive email it to kiu@ikangai.com.
Monitor both local and remote (ssh.ikangai.com) systems: check CPU load, memory, and disk on both. Generate a unified status dashboard.
Build a project locally (create tarball of /tmp/clive/src/), transfer it to ssh.ikangai.com via scp, then have the remote system extract and verify the files.
Collect the last 50 lines of syslog from ssh.ikangai.com and the last 50 lines from local /var/log/system.log. Merge them chronologically and highlight any errors.
Create a backup of /tmp/clive/data/ locally, rsync it to ssh.ikangai.com:/tmp/backup/, then verify the remote backup matches the local files using checksums.
Read the local clive config from ~/.clive/config/, generate a matching config for the remote instance, and deploy it to ssh.ikangai.com:~/.clive/config/ via scp.
Check if the remote server ssh.ikangai.com has disk usage over 80% or load average over 4.0. If either condition is true, send an alert email to kiu@ikangai.com with the details.

Fetch the latest news from https://news.ycombinator.com using lynx, fetch the current weather for Munich from Open-Meteo API, and compile both into a morning briefing document. Email it to kiu@ikangai.com.

Download sales data from https://jsonplaceholder.typicode.com/posts (simulating sales API), process it locally to extract user IDs and counts, then upload the summary CSV to ssh.ikangai.com and have remote clive generate a report.
